title: BLOAT: Monster Ores
description: New ores that drop different mob-based items as well as a host of other features meant to expand their use and make caving more enjoyable.
body:
![Logo that says "BLOAT: Monster Ores Update 1.2 - Ore-Ver-Haul"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f82751167ef18f55e114be97d82217e8a0b70dea.png)

This mod adds a ton of new ores that drop mob drops such as rotten flesh, ghast tears, ender pearls, glow ink sacs, etc. It also adds a few more things just for the sake of giving many of these items a use beyond the one purpose many of them have.
